modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't access the course mapping request form link.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to submit a course mapping request, but the link just isn't working. It keeps saying the server can't be found, and I got some weird error messages like "this site can't be reached." I even tried running some network diagnostics, but nothing seems to help.
short_description: Can't access the course mapping request form link.
description: So, I was trying to submit a course mapping request, but the link just isn't working. It keeps saying the server can't be found, and I got some weird error messages like "this site can't be reached." I even tried running some network diagnostics, but nothing seems to help.
